name: github.com.argoproj.argo_events.pkg.apis.events.v1alpha1.TLSConfig
description: TLSConfig refers to TLS configuration for a client.

caCertSecret.name: CACertSecret refers to the secret that contains the CA cert

clientCertSecret.name: ClientCertSecret refers to the secret that contains the client cert

clientKeySecret.name: ClientKeySecret refers to the secret that contains the client key

enabled.name:
Enabled indicates if TLS is enabled. Added for compatibility proposes for Brokers that needs TLS without key authentication
+optional

insecureSkipVerify.name:
If true, skips creation of TLSConfig with certs and creates an empty TLSConfig. (Defaults to false)
+optional
